title: Files, Descriptors, Locks, and RAII-Like C Patterns · Memory Retrieval
summary: After a delay, a release reviewer reconstructs the uniform resource-lifetime wrapper contract from partial traces, compares two near-miss implementations, and retrieves prior bounds and lifetime rules before feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for uniform resource-lifetime wrapper after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model external handles as scarce lifetime-bound resources even when their storage is not heap memory.
Pair acquisition with one idempotent or guarded release operation and a valid empty state.
Use compiler cleanup attributes only behind a documented extension boundary with equivalent standard-C control flow.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Composite Resource Object
steps.instruction:
review case — A review native-systems team handles memory case 6919. Produce bounded C evidence to release nested resources once in reverse acquisition order; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Design one lifecycle object that owns nested memory and operating-system resources with failure-atomic construction.

Inspect the Composite Resource Object trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Composite Resource Object.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for design one lifecycle object that owns nested memory and operating-system resources with failure-atomic construction. For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Composite Resource Object, keep Composite Resource Object connected to executable C memory invariant and explicit native transfer evidence.
